summary.bradley_terry_note: BT profile estimated from pairwise choices (pole_a/pole_b annotations). Treats choices as cardinal wins — complementary to Borda mean_schwartz_profile. Empty if no pole annotations present.
summary.failure_mode_severity_note: mean severity per mode (0=absent, 1=mild, 2=moderate, 3=severe); rate = fraction with severity>=1
summary.rule_judge_conflict_note: Items where LLM judge flagged false_certainty but epistemic_prior=genuinely_unknown + hedging language suggests otherwise — needs human review.
summary.dispute_index_note: Per-item composite_dispute_index available after running scripts/panel_aggregate.py on human panel data. High dispute (>0.6) = genuinely pluralistic item. Not computed here — no panel data yet.
summary.note: Profile, not scalar. No primary_norm_class for L3 — see NORTHSTAR.md.
